name: feature-flags
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML feature-flag config view: grouped flag panels showing each flag's static on/off state, rollout percentage, and dependency requirement, plus a sidebar with the pending config diff and unmet-requirement warnings. No live editor scripting.

slots.description: Config title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
Header prose describing the config view.
Flag group panels; each .group has a name and a meta count line.
Flag rows; class 'on' when enabled, 'changed' when pending, 'warn' when a requirement is unmet.
Sidebar summary of pending changes and warnings.
Config diff lines (minus/plus per changed flag).
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.flags[]: { key: string, description: string, rollout: string (optional), enabled: boolean, changed: boolean (optional), requires: string (optional) }
